260 STG_3_PRSR_ULCRS_ADMSN_NUM STG_3_PRSR_ULCRS_ADMSN_NUM 48BA/M0300C1 Stage 3 Pressure Ulcers Admission Number. When Discharge Date is on or after Oct. 1,2014, M0300C1 Stage 3 Pressure Ulcers Admission Number will be displayed CHAR 1 This indicates the number of unhealed Stage 3 pressure ulcers that were present at the time of admission.
261 STG_3_PRSR_ULCRS_DSCHRG_NUM STG_3_PRSR_ULCRS_DSCHRG_NUM 48BD/M0300C1
